series_metadata.series_description: The file contains copies of contracts processed and retained by the ODJFS Office of Contracts and Acquisitions for personal services involving meeting facilities, assessment of office functions and operations, and consultations regarding program issues.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 60 days after hardcopy is prepped, scanned (imaged), and quality control is complete then destroyed. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years after contract expires, then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
